# crowci_repository_secret (Resource)

Secret scoped to a specific repository on the Crow CI server.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "crowci_repository_secret" "deploy_key" {
  repo_id = 42
  name    = "deploy-key"
  value   = "ssh-ed25519 AAAA..."
  events  = ["push", "tag"]
}

# With image restriction
resource "crowci_repository_secret" "docker_password" {
  repo_id = 42
  name    = "docker-password"
  value   = "s3cr3t"
  events  = ["push"]
  images  = ["plugins/docker"]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `events` (List of String) Events that trigger the secret.
- `name` (String) Secret name.
- `repo_id` (Number) ID of the repository this secret belongs to.
- `value` (String, Sensitive) Secret value. Not returned by the API after creation.

### Optional

- `images` (List of String) Container images the secret is available to. Empty list means all images.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (Number) Creation time as a Unix timestamp.
- `id` (Number) Secret ID assigned by Crow CI.
- `source` (String) Source of the secret.
- `updated_at` (Number) Last update time as a Unix timestamp.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

In Terraform v1.12.0 and later, the [`import` block](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/import) can be used with the `identity` attribute, for example:

```terraform
import {
  to = crowci_repository_secret.example
  identity = {
    repo_id = 42
    name    = "deploy-key"
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
### Identity Schema

#### Required

- `name` (String) Secret name.
- `repo_id` (Number) ID of the repository this secret belongs to.

In Terraform v1.5.0 and later, the [`import` block](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/import) can be used with the `id` attribute, for example:

```terraform
import {
  to = crowci_repository_secret.example
  id = "42/deploy-key"
}
```

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
terraform import crowci_repository_secret.example 42/deploy-key
```
